latin: Dux sodalicii, saponem manu tenens, leges exposuit: 'regula prima Collegii Pugnandi haec est: de Collegio Pugnandi nemo loquatur.'

questions.target: No one talks about Fight Club
choices: No one talks about Fight Club

translation: The leader of the club, holding soap in his hand, set forth the rules: 'The first rule of Fight Club is this: no one shall speak about Fight Club.'
